title: Diddy Kong Racing vs Zelda Wind Waker (Spaceport Alpha / Pirate Ship Mashup)
description: Filler time! So this is actually something I did a while ago, to see how well these tracks go together (because of how similar they sound at 0:35, its something that I've always noticed) Sorry it's short, I can't be bothered to make it longer.
